instructions.1: Add 1/2 cup Greek yogurt to the bottom of a tall glass or mason jar.
instructions.2: Layer 1/4 cup granola over the yogurt.
instructions.3: Add a layer of mixed berries (strawberries, blueberries, raspberries).
instructions.4: Repeat layers: yogurt, granola, berries.
instructions.5: Drizzle with 1 tbsp honey and serve immediately.

instructions.1: Toast 2 slices of sourdough bread until golden and crispy.
instructions.2: While bread toasts, halve the avocado, remove pit, and scoop flesh into a bowl. Mash with a fork, season with salt, pepper, and a squeeze of lemon juice.
instructions.3: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat. Crack 2 eggs into the pan and cook to your preference (2-3 min per side for over-easy).
instructions.4: Spread mashed avocado generously on each toast slice.
instructions.5: Top with a fried egg. Finish with red pepper flakes, flaky salt, and a scattering of microgreens.

instructions.1: Heat a cast iron skillet or frying pan over medium heat. Add 4 strips of bacon.
instructions.2: Cook bacon 3-4 min per side until crispy and browned. Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate.
instructions.3: Pour off most of the bacon fat, leaving about 1 tbsp in the pan.
instructions.4: Crack 3 eggs into the pan. Season with salt and pepper.
instructions.5: Cook 2-3 minutes per side for over-easy, or flip and cook 1 more minute for over-hard.
instructions.6: Serve eggs alongside the bacon with toast if desired.

instructions.1: Brown 3 strips of breakfast sausage in a non-stick pan, breaking into crumbles. Remove and set aside.
instructions.2: Wipe the pan clean. Add 1/2 tbsp butter.
instructions.3: Crack 2 eggs into the pan, scramble until just set, and remove from heat.
instructions.4: Place a large flour tortilla in the pan. Layer scrambled eggs, sausage crumbles, and 1/2 cup shredded cheddar on one half.
instructions.5: Fold the tortilla in half and press down gently. Cook 2 min per side until golden and cheese is melted.
instructions.6: Cut into wedges and serve with salsa and sour cream.

instructions.1: Add 1 frozen banana, 1 scoop protein powder (vanilla), 1/2 cup frozen mixed berries, 1/4 cup Greek yogurt, and 1/2 cup almond milk to a blender.
instructions.2: Blend on high until thick and smooth, adding more almond milk only if needed. Should be thick like soft-serve.
instructions.3: Pour into a bowl.
instructions.4: Top with sliced banana, additional berries, 2 tbsp granola, and 1 tbsp chia seeds.
instructions.5: Drizzle with almond butter if desired and serve immediately.

instructions.1: Bring 3/4 cup water (or milk of choice) to a boil in a small saucepan.
instructions.2: Add 1/2 cup rolled oats and a pinch of salt. Reduce heat to medium-low.
instructions.3: Cook, stirring occasionally, for 4-5 minutes until oats are tender and mixture has thickened.
instructions.4: Remove from heat. Stir in 1/2 tsp vanilla extract and 1 tsp honey or maple syrup.
instructions.5: Top with 1/2 cup fresh mixed berries, 1 tbsp ground flaxseed, and a sprinkle of cinnamon.

instructions.1: Brown 4 oz breakfast sausage or chorizo in a skillet, breaking into crumbles. Remove and set aside.
instructions.2: In the same pan, cook 2 beaten eggs, scrambling until just set. Season with salt and pepper.
instructions.3: Warm 1 large flour tortilla in a dry pan or microwave.
instructions.4: Spread 2 tbsp black beans (drained) on the tortilla.
instructions.5: Layer eggs, sausage, 1/4 cup shredded cheese, and 2 tbsp pico de gallo down the center.
instructions.6: Fold in the sides and roll tightly. Optional: grill seam-side down until golden.
instructions.7: Cut in half diagonally and serve with sour cream and hot sauce.

instructions.1: Whisk together 2 eggs, 1/3 cup milk, 1 tsp vanilla extract, 1/2 tsp cinnamon, and a pinch of salt in a shallow dish.
instructions.2: Heat a non-stick skillet or griddle over medium heat. Add 1 tbsp butter.
instructions.3: Dip 2 thick slices of brioche or Challah bread into the egg mixture, letting each side soak for 15-20 seconds.
instructions.4: Place in the hot pan. Cook 3-4 min per side until golden brown.
instructions.5: Keep finished slices warm in a 200°F oven while cooking the rest.
instructions.6: Serve topped with fresh berries, a dusting of powdered sugar, and a drizzle of maple syrup.

instructions.1: In a large bowl, whisk 1 cup all-purpose flour, 2 tbsp sugar, 1 tsp baking powder, 1/2 tsp baking soda, and 1/4 tsp salt.
instructions.2: In another bowl, whisk 1 cup buttermilk, 2 eggs, 2 tbsp melted butter, and 1 tsp vanilla.
instructions.3: Pour wet ingredients into dry. Stir until just combined — lumps are okay. Do not overmix.
instructions.4: Heat a griddle or non-stick pan over medium heat. Lightly butter the surface.
instructions.5: Pour 1/4 cup batter per pancake. Cook until bubbles form on the surface and edges look set, about 2-3 min. Flip and cook 1-2 min more.
instructions.6: Serve stacks with butter and warm maple syrup.

instructions.1: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 6-cup muffin tin with butter or non-stick spray.
instructions.2: In a large bowl, whisk 8 eggs with 1/4 cup milk, 1/4 tsp salt, and 1/4 tsp black pepper.
instructions.3: Divide evenly among the muffin cups.
instructions.4: Top each with diced bell peppers, spinach, shredded cheese, and cooked crumbled bacon or mushrooms as desired.
instructions.5: Bake 20-25 minutes until eggs are set and tops are lightly golden.
instructions.6: Let cool 5 min before removing. Store leftovers in the fridge up to 4 days.

instructions.1: Add 1/2 cup Greek yogurt to the bottom of a tall glass or mason jar.
instructions.2: Layer 1/4 cup granola over the yogurt.
instructions.3: Add a layer of mixed berries (strawberries, blueberries, raspberries).
instructions.4: Repeat layers: yogurt, granola, berries.
instructions.5: Drizzle with 1 tbsp honey and serve immediately.

instructions.1: Toast 2 slices of sourdough bread until golden and crispy.
instructions.2: While bread toasts, halve the avocado, remove pit, and scoop flesh into a bowl. Mash with a fork, season with salt, pepper, and a squeeze of lemon juice.
instructions.3: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a non-stick pan over medium heat. Crack 2 eggs into the pan and cook to your preference (2-3 min per side for over-easy).
instructions.4: Spread mashed avocado generously on each toast slice.
instructions.5: Top with a fried egg. Finish with red pepper flakes, flaky salt, and microgreens.

instructions.1: Heat a cast iron skillet over medium heat. Add 4 strips of bacon.
instructions.2: Cook bacon 3-4 min per side until crispy. Transfer to a paper towel-lined plate.
instructions.3: Pour off most of the bacon fat, leaving about 1 tbsp.
instructions.4: Crack 3 eggs into the pan. Season with salt and pepper.
instructions.5: Cook 2-3 min per side for over-easy, or flip and cook 1 more minute for over-hard.

instructions.1: Brown 3 oz breakfast sausage in a non-stick pan, breaking into crumbles. Remove and set aside.
instructions.2: Wipe the pan clean. Add 1/2 tbsp butter.
instructions.3: Scramble 2 eggs until just set. Season with salt and pepper.
instructions.4: Place a large flour tortilla in the pan. Layer eggs, sausage crumbles, and 1/2 cup shredded cheddar on one half.
instructions.5: Fold the tortilla in half. Cook 2 min per side until golden and cheese is melted.
instructions.6: Cut into wedges. Serve with salsa and sour cream.

instructions.1: Add 1 frozen banana, 1 scoop vanilla protein powder, 1/2 cup frozen berries, 1/4 cup Greek yogurt, and 1/2 cup almond milk to a blender.
instructions.2: Blend on high until thick and smooth. Should be thick like soft-serve.
instructions.3: Pour into a bowl.
instructions.4: Top with sliced banana, additional berries, 2 tbsp granola, and 1 tbsp chia seeds.
instructions.5: Drizzle with almond butter and serve immediately.

instructions.1: Bring 3/4 cup water or milk to a boil in a small saucepan.
instructions.2: Add 1/2 cup rolled oats and a pinch of salt. Reduce heat to medium-low.
instructions.3: Cook, stirring occasionally, for 4-5 minutes until oats are tender.
instructions.4: Remove from heat. Stir in 1/2 tsp vanilla and 1 tsp honey.
instructions.5: Top with 1/2 cup fresh berries, 1 tbsp ground flaxseed, and a sprinkle of cinnamon.

instructions.1: Brown 4 oz breakfast sausage or chorizo in a skillet, breaking into crumbles. Remove and set aside.
instructions.2: Scramble 2 eggs in the same pan until just set. Season with salt and pepper.
instructions.3: Warm 1 large flour tortilla in a dry pan or microwave.
instructions.4: Spread 2 tbsp black beans on the tortilla. Layer eggs, sausage, 1/4 cup shredded cheese, and 2 tbsp pico de gallo down the center.
instructions.5: Fold in the sides and roll tightly. Optional: grill seam-side down until golden.
instructions.6: Cut in half and serve with sour cream and hot sauce.

instructions.1: Whisk together 2 eggs, 1/3 cup milk, 1 tsp vanilla extract, 1/2 tsp cinnamon, and a pinch of salt.
instructions.2: Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat. Add 1 tbsp butter.
instructions.3: Dip 2 thick slices of brioche or Challah bread into the egg mixture for 15-20 seconds per side.
instructions.4: Place in the hot pan. Cook 3-4 min per side until golden brown.
instructions.5: Keep finished slices warm in a 200°F oven while cooking the rest.
instructions.6: Serve topped with fresh berries, powdered sugar, and maple syrup.

instructions.1: In a large bowl, whisk 1 cup flour, 2 tbsp sugar, 1 tsp baking powder, 1/2 tsp baking soda, and 1/4 tsp salt.
instructions.2: In another bowl, whisk 1 cup buttermilk, 2 eggs, 2 tbsp melted butter, and 1 tsp vanilla.
instructions.3: Pour wet ingredients into dry. Stir until just combined — lumps are okay. Do not overmix.
instructions.4: Heat a griddle over medium heat. Lightly butter the surface.
instructions.5: Pour 1/4 cup batter per pancake. Cook until bubbles form on surface and edges look set, about 2-3 min. Flip and cook 1-2 min more.
instructions.6: Serve with butter and warm maple syrup.

instructions.1: Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease a 6-cup muffin tin with butter or non-stick spray.
instructions.2: Whisk 8 eggs with 1/4 cup milk, 1/4 tsp salt, and 1/4 tsp black pepper.
instructions.3: Divide evenly among the muffin cups.
instructions.4: Top each with diced bell peppers, spinach, shredded cheese, and optional cooked bacon or mushrooms.
instructions.5: Bake 20-25 minutes until eggs are set and tops are lightly golden.
instructions.6: Let cool 5 min before removing. Store leftovers in the fridge up to 4 days.

instructions.1: Dice 1 medium sweet potato into 1/2-inch cubes. Toss with 1 tbsp olive oil, salt, pepper. Roast at 400°F for 20 min.
instructions.2: Meanwhile, brown 4 oz breakfast sausage in a cast iron skillet. Remove.
instructions.3: In the same pan, sauté 1/2 diced onion and 1/2 diced bell pepper until softened.
instructions.4: Add 1 cup kale or spinach and cook until wilted.
instructions.5: Return sausage to pan. Add roasted sweet potato. Toss together.
instructions.6: Make 2 wells and crack 2 eggs into the gaps. Cover and cook until eggs are set.
instructions.7: Garnish with hot sauce and green onions.

instructions.1: Slice 1 everything bagel in half. Toast until golden.
instructions.2: Spread 2 tbsp cream cheese on each half.
instructions.3: Layer 3 oz smoked salmon on top.
instructions.4: Add 4 cucumber slices and 2 slices red onion.
instructions.5: Top with fresh dill, capers, and a squeeze of lemon.

instructions.1: Blend 1 pack frozen acai (100g), 1 frozen banana, 1/2 cup frozen mixed berries, and 1/4 cup almond milk until thick and smooth.
instructions.2: Pour into a bowl.
instructions.3: Top with: sliced banana, fresh berries, 2 tbsp granola, 1 tbsp coconut flakes, and 1 tbsp chia seeds.
instructions.4: Drizzle with honey and serve immediately.

instructions.1: Whisk 3 eggs with 1 tbsp milk, salt, and pepper.
instructions.2: Heat 1 tbsp butter in a non-stick pan over medium.
instructions.3: Pour in eggs and let set 30 seconds.
instructions.4: Add fillings to one half: 1/4 cup sautéed mushrooms, 1/4 cup spinach, 2 tbsp diced bell pepper, 1/4 cup shredded cheese.
instructions.5: Cover and cook 2 min until cheese melts.
instructions.6: Fold omelette in half. Slide onto plate.

instructions.1: In a mason jar or container, combine 1/2 cup rolled oats, 1/2 cup milk, 1/4 cup Greek yogurt, and 1 tbsp chia seeds.
instructions.2: Stir in 1 tbsp maple syrup or honey.
instructions.3: Add 1/4 tsp vanilla extract and a pinch of cinnamon.
instructions.4: Stir well, cover, and refrigerate overnight (or at least 4 hours).
instructions.5: In the morning, top with fresh berries, sliced banana, and a sprinkle of granola.

instructions.1: Preheat your waffle iron. Whisk 1.5 cups flour, 2 tbsp sugar, 1.5 tsp baking powder, 1/4 tsp salt in a bowl.
instructions.2: Whisk 1.25 cups milk, 1 egg, 1/4 cup melted butter, and 1 tsp vanilla in another bowl.
instructions.3: Pour wet into dry. Stir until just combined (lumps okay).
instructions.4: Pour batter into preheated waffle iron. Cook until golden and steam stops, about 4-5 min.
instructions.5: Serve immediately with butter and warm maple syrup. Top with fresh berries.

instructions.1: Add to blender: 1 frozen banana, 1 cup milk, 1/2 cup frozen mango chunks, 1/4 cup Greek yogurt, 1 tbsp almond butter, and 1/2 tsp vanilla.
instructions.2: Blend on high until smooth and creamy.
instructions.3: Pour into a tall glass.
instructions.4: Drink immediately.

instructions.1: Heat 2 tbsp olive oil in a large skillet over medium.
instructions.2: Add 1 diced onion and 1 diced bell pepper. Sauté 5 min until softened.
instructions.3: Add 4 minced garlic cloves, 1 tsp cumin, 1 tsp paprika, and 1/2 tsp chili flakes. Cook 1 min.
instructions.4: Add 1 can crushed tomatoes (28 oz) and 1 tsp sugar. Simmer 10 min until sauce thickens.
instructions.5: Make 4 wells in the sauce. Crack an egg into each well.
instructions.6: Cover and cook 5-7 min until egg whites are set but yolks are still runny.
instructions.7: Garnish with feta cheese, fresh parsley, and serve with crusty bread.

instructions.1: Toast 2 slices of whole grain bread until golden.
instructions.2: Spread 2 tbsp peanut butter on each slice.
instructions.3: Slice 1 banana and arrange on top.
instructions.4: Drizzle with 1 tsp honey and sprinkle with cinnamon.
instructions.5: Optional: add a few chocolate chips or chia seeds.

instructions.1: Slice everything bagel in half. Toast.
instructions.2: Spread cream cheese on each half.
instructions.3: Layer smoked salmon, cucumber, and red onion.
instructions.4: Top with fresh dill, capers, and lemon squeeze. Season with pepper.
